channel.title: World | The Indian Express
channel.description: Latest News Today: Breaking News and Top Headlines from India, Entertainment, Business, Politics and Sports

item.title: Israeli minister Dermer says he’s confident Trump would reject ‘bad’ Iran deal
Iran says fire extinguished at a port rocked by explosion as the death toll rises to at least 70
